title: RANKING EVERY C5 CORVETTE VARIANT
hook: The Base Coupe introduced the C5 generation with a 345-horsepower LS1 V8 engine.
narration: The Base Coupe introduced the C5 generation with a 345-horsepower LS1 V8 engine. The Convertible offered the same performance as the Coupe with the added thrill of open-top driving. The Fixed Roof Coupe (FRC) was the lightest C5 variant, setting the stage for the Z06. The Z06 featured a 405-horsepower LS6 engine and track-focused enhancements. Which C5 variant is your favorite?
theme: AI-researched draft for request: rank all variants for c5 corvette
